originalTitle: Trump teleprompter operator faces scrutiny over prediction market bets
summary: Aide allegedly used advanced knowledge of president’s speeches to profit on ‘mention markets’ wagers
content: Aide allegedly used advanced knowledge of president’s speeches to profit on ‘mention markets’ wagers
chineseTitle: 特朗普提词器操作员面临预测市场押注审查
chineseSummary: 据称，助手利用对总统演讲的深入了解，从“提及市场”赌注中获利
chineseContent: 据称，助手利用对总统演讲的深入了解，从“提及市场”赌注中获利
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
